# Build B — the AI-OS (scope, v1)

> **Distinct from Build A** (the predictive tracking software, see [build-a.md](build-a.md)). Same client, connected but separate workstreams: do not conflate them.
>
> **⚠️ REFRAMED 2026-06-03 (see [log.md](log.md)).** The "separate platform" premise is dropped: the existing app is the platform now. The standalone-platform framing is superseded.

## Vision

The full owner-operator layer, fit to the client. Two halves, both in scope long-term.
